channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Biden DOJ Was In Cahoots With SPLC As It Funded Extremist Groups, Former Official Admits
item.description: Just because it was known to the DOJ and FBI doesn't make the SPLC's actions right.

item.title: Sen. Collins addresses health speculation, says she has benign neurological condition
item.description: Republican Sen. Susan Collins of Maine sought to quell speculation about her trembling hands, shaky head, and wavering voice this week, saying she has...

item.title: Agency will move forward with plans to propose weakening some Biden-era PFAS limits, official says
item.description: The Trump administration will soon propose softening Biden-era limits on "forever chemicals" in drinking water, delaying but keeping tough standards f...

item.title: Virginia state senator says FBI raid all about politics, but probe dates to Biden days
item.description: Virginia state Sen. L. Louise Lucas accused the Trump administration of greenlighting an FBI raid on her businesses because of the Democrat's support ...
